generator: OpenClaw BCN website design sprint — workstream 7 (data snapshot)
snapshot_scope: Static BCN website concept dataset with verified Eventbrite links and light enrichment from public Eventbrite pages.

trust_stats.source: Derived real trust stats from the sprint brief's historical venue table.

verified_with: Per-event Eventbrite pages fetched via web_fetch on 2026-04-04
BCN Eventbrite organizer page fetched via web_fetch on 2026-04-04
Eventbrite search result pages fetched via web_fetch on 2026-04-04 to cross-check recurring-series landing pages and surfaced date counts

notes: Readable organizer-page extraction exposed counts but not the full list of titles.

Accessible Eventbrite search pages clearly surfaced 3 BCN recurring/active listings matching the provided snapshot: Academy Comedy Nights (4 dates), Friday Night Stand-Up Comedy In English For FREE! (1 date), and English Stand-Up Comedy Antwerp: Best of Belgium (3 dates).
No additional BCN event was added because the accessible public fetches did not expose a fourth title with enough confidence to attribute it safely.

series.series_name: Academy Comedy Nights – Free English Stand-Up in Brussels
series.description_summary: A bi-weekly English stand-up comedy night in Brussels with rising comedians, new material, free entry, and optional crowdfunded contributions.
series.lineup_summary: Fresh lineup of comedians honing their craft; no named acts exposed in the accessible fetch.
series.image_notes: No reliable Eventbrite image URL extracted via the available tools.

series.series_name: Friday Night Stand-Up Comedy In English For FREE!
series.description_summary: English-language showcase at GC Kontakt / Av. Orban 54 featuring six rising Belgian comedy acts.
series.lineup_summary: Eventbrite copy promises six rising stars, but no names were exposed in the accessible fetch.
series.image_notes: No reliable Eventbrite image URL extracted via the available tools.

series.series_name: English Stand-Up Comedy Antwerp: Best of Belgium
series.description_summary: English-language stand-up in Antwerp at Vertigo with strong Belgian comedians, reservations online, and €5 paid at the door.
series.lineup_summary: Handpicked lineup of Belgium's strongest English-speaking comedians; no named acts exposed in the accessible fetch.
series.image_notes: No reliable Eventbrite image URL extracted via the available tools.

events.event_name: Academy Comedy Nights – Free English Stand-Up in Brussels
events.ticket_model: Free entry; academy-style crowdfunded show with optional contributions at the end.
events.description_short: A bi-weekly English stand-up comedy night in Brussels with top comedians, big laughs, and free entry.
events.description_long: Looking for laughs in the heart of Brussels? Welcome to Academy Comedy Night — where rising talent and sharp new material take the stage. Join BCN at Latroupe Grote Markt for a night of free English stand-up comedy featuring a fresh lineup of comedians honing their craft in front of a live audience. This is where jokes are tested, voices are shaped, and tomorrow's headliners are built.
highlights: Fresh lineup of comedians honing sharp, original sets
International crowd of locals, expats, and travelers
Arrive early; seating is limited and fills up fast
events.lineup_info: Eventbrite copy describes a fresh lineup of rising comedians, but no named acts were exposed in the accessible fetch.
events.image_notes: No reliable image URL retrieved from accessible public Eventbrite fetches.
uncertainty_notes: Description appears to be recurring-series copy rather than per-date custom copy.
No named lineup, poster image, or exact street address was exposed in the accessible fetch.

events.event_name: Friday Night Stand-Up Comedy In English For FREE!
events.ticket_model: Free listing per baseline snapshot and Eventbrite title; reserve online.
events.description_short: An English-language Friday showcase in Brussels spotlighting six rising acts from the Belgian comedy scene.
events.description_long: English Stand-up at GC Kontakt: an evening showcasing emerging comedians delivering hilarious stand-up acts. Eventbrite copy promises an electric night of laughter with six rising stars of the Belgian comedy scene, each bringing sharp wit, bold material, and a distinct style to the stage.
highlights: Six rising Belgian comedy acts promised in the Eventbrite copy
events.lineup_info: Eventbrite copy says the show features six rising stars, but no performer names were exposed in the accessible fetch.
events.image_notes: No reliable image URL retrieved from accessible public Eventbrite fetches.
uncertainty_notes: Venue text references GC Kontakt while the baseline venue name is the street address; this likely refers to the same place, but the public fetch did not resolve that explicitly.
No named lineup or poster image was exposed in the accessible fetch.

events.event_name: English Stand-Up Comedy Antwerp: Best of Belgium
events.ticket_model: Free online reservation; €5 paid at the door.
events.description_short: BCN's Antwerp night at Vertigo pairs English stand-up with a cozy cocktail-bar setting and a handpicked Belgian lineup.
events.description_long: Join BCN for a night of hilarious stand-up comedy in English, featuring the best comedians from Belgium, in Antwerp. The show is hosted at Vertigo, one of the city's cozier cocktail bars, and Eventbrite describes it as a full stand-up comedy show with a handpicked lineup of strong English-speaking comedians, sharp writing, and a focused comedy crowd in an intimate setting.
highlights: Handpicked lineup of Belgian English-speaking comedians
Free reservation online; €5 paid at the door
events.lineup_info: Eventbrite copy promises a handpicked lineup of some of Belgium's strongest English-speaking comedians, but no names were exposed in the accessible fetch.
events.image_notes: No reliable image URL retrieved from accessible public Eventbrite fetches.
uncertainty_notes: No named lineup or poster image was exposed in the accessible fetch.
